introSection: Freestyle is a stand-up roller coaster located at Cavallino Matto in Castagneto Carducci, Tuscany, Italy. Built by TOGO, it originally opened in 1985 at Canada's Wonderland under the name SkyRider.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride first opened at Canada's Wonderland in 1985 as SkyRider.

In August 1999, SkyRider was forced to close after a passenger was killed on Shockwave at Kings Dominion.

SkyRider closed on 1 September 2014. It reopened to the public at Cavallino Matto on 18 July 2015. An official opening ceremony was held on Saturday 25 July featuring Italian actor Paolo Ruffini as a special guest.

SkyRider's plot of land at Canada's Wonderland is now occupied by Yukon Striker, a Bolliger & Mabillard Dive Coaster.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: At Canada's Wonderland, the ride was painted green with black supports. It is now painted yellow with black supports.

sections.title: Images
sections.content: The following photographs were taken while the ride was at Canada's Wonderland.

fullText:
Freestyle is a stand-up roller coaster located at Cavallino Matto in Castagneto Carducci, Tuscany, Italy. Built by TOGO, it originally opened in 1985 at Canada's Wonderland under the name SkyRider.

The ride first opened at Canada's Wonderland in 1985 as SkyRider.

In August 1999, SkyRider was forced to close after a passenger was killed on Shockwave at Kings Dominion.

SkyRider closed on 1 September 2014. It reopened to the public at Cavallino Matto on 18 July 2015. An official opening ceremony was held on Saturday 25 July featuring Italian actor Paolo Ruffini as a special guest.

SkyRider's plot of land at Canada's Wonderland is now occupied by Yukon Striker, a Bolliger & Mabillard Dive Coaster.



At Canada's Wonderland, the ride was painted green with black supports. It is now painted yellow with black supports.



The following photographs were taken while the ride was at Canada's Wonderland.
